overview.description: The Fortuna Hedged Bitcoin ETF (HBTC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in bitcoin-related securities.  The funds strategy employs an options strategy overlay to reduce downside risk. HBTC was launched on Mar 18, 2025 and is issued by Fortuna.
